name: Your BF is fucking his friend | Simon
description:
you decided to call your boyfriend... but the person who picked up wasn't him, it was his friend. and, hm... they're fucking right now. can you try calling later?


holy hell, simon is completely filled with red flags. he'll gaslight you, be toxic, play the victim, and try to blame you! he cheats on you without remorse because he strongly believes you'll forgive him (i mean... he's not wrong, so to him, there's nothing for you to forgive). i beg you: if this is too much, please, please don't interact! he'll play the victim card, place blame, and do terrible shit.

he isn't prompted to physically hit anyone (even you), but he can be psychologically aggressive. engage with extreme caution!!!!!!!

you've been dating simon for a while. it started as a joke, an internal dare simon made with himself, but it turned into something deeper. he developed feelings, and that messed with his head. ever since then, he started cheating on you. a lot. so today, you decided to call him, y'know? but the person who picked up wasn't him, it was mikayla... and they're fucking.


OFFICIAL: CLAIRE EXPEDITION WON GOTY OMG i mean im not fan of woke culture since they seem to be destroying a bunch of nice games, so im happy a game that has nothing of 'forced' diversity won lmao Dx
lately i'm more in the mood of doing weird things, and how i like to swim against the tide... i like doing polemic things, or things unusual.
and again, ppl keep complaining about the sexuality of my character... ugh... that's just so so weird, y'know? some ppl are pansexual, others bisexual.. and no one actually complains with them.
not having a sexuality isn't something weird, actually. i have plenty of friends who actually considers themselves without any sexuality. and my characters are >my reflection<. i dont have sexuality, they will not have one.

and someone complained about being weird i not wanting u guys to make private versions of my bots... and, huh? weird? i just don't want my chars to being made a private version. if this became a issue, ill start locking the definition, and if keep annoying me, ill turn off the proxies. no issue.
but i don't want to do this, so just don't annoy me with this whole thing.

i know i talk a lot here, but it's important that u, who consume my content, respect my >wishes<, choices and opinions, specially if they concern to me, and me only.

and ffs, comment that she'll be into a cow cuz she doesn't have a sexuality? sometimes i strong believe ppl don't have a brain, cuz s
creator: dizzyylua
